---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Propose a new feature, interactive lesson, or visual improvement."
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "proposal"]
assignees: ""
---

### 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "It's difficult for students to understand their grit progress without visual level-ups...")

---

### 🌟 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of the feature or upgrade you want to see. 

---

### 🎨 Visual & Aesthetic Design
How should this new element look and behave? Explain how it fits our premium design principles:
- **Aesthetic Theme:** [e.g., Glassmorphism cards, glowing snap guides, sleek dark mode HSL tokens]
- **Micro-Animations:** [e.g., Hardware-accelerated transforms, spring-back drag releases]
- **Contrast & Accessibility:** [e.g., WCAG AA contrast, keyboard accessibility]

---

### 📚 Pedagogy & Learning Alignment
How does this feature enhance **Socratic mentoring** or **Holistic growth tracking** (Grit, Curiosity, Critical Thinking, Empathy)?

---

### 💡 Alternative Solutions Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought of.
